signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate confirmed at 2.2% (up from 2.0% in Feb), beating forecasts of 2.4%.** | YES | HIGH confidence[2][3]

signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows ($119
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows ($119.6M), Unseating Bitcoin & Solana; U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Boosts Rally | YES | HIGH**  
XRP led digital asset inflows with $119.6M last week—its strongest since mid-December 2025—amid $224M total inflows, signaling institutional recovery despite macro caution; this drove a 5.52% price rise to $1.38, amplified by the U.S.-Iran ceasefire and Evernorth SPAC merger

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Holders in April | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Holders in April | YES | MED**  
Solana token holders reached an all-time high of 167M in April (12% rise since October 2025), with $34.9M inflows, but $18.2B outflows tempered price gains despite a 7% surge to $87 post-ceasefire.[6][1]
